strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and teaching background indicating communication and architectural thinking
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest experience beyond junior/mid-level, risking misalignment with role seniority
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services as required in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript and modern web architectures, along with strong ownership of complex systems and a collaborative mindset — but his seniority level, lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js exposure, and limited German proficiency raise questions about alignment with the junior/mid-level, on-site focused role in renewable energy tech.
